hero.heading: Sri Raghavendra Swamy Seva Samiti Trust
hero.body: Raghavendra Swamy Mutt, Adakamaranahalli was built for the convenience of Sri Guru Rayara devotees. In consonance with the famous saying from Mahabharata 'Dharmo Rakshati Rakshitaha' the Mutt regularly conducts various religious activities including various Poojas, Homas, Annadana and welcomes devotees to perform functions such as Upanayana, Upakarma, Shraddha Tarpana amongst others. The Mutt is also making sure to do its part in helping students by providing scholarships and other just benefits.

quote.attribution: Charity, done to the right person in the right place, always bears fruit.

sevas.heading: Seva Registration
sevas.hours: Temple is open every day from 6.00 A.M. to 12.00 P.M. & 5.00 P.M. to 8.00 P.M
sevas.ctaPrompt: For booking & enquiry for more details

bank.heading: BANK ACCOUNT
bank.accountNameValue: Sri Raghavendra Swamy Seva Samiti Trust
bank.exemption: All donations made in India are exempted from tax when claimed under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act, 1961
bank.exemptionDescription: Please scan the QR code or use the account details provided to make the intended donations or pay for sevas. After completing the payment, kindly share the payment details to receive the receipt for the donations/sevas.

about.heading: Sri Raghavendra Swamy Seva Samiti Trust
about.body: Raghavendra Math was built for the convenience of Guru Raya's devotees and for the convenience of performing religious works such as distributing food, distributing prasad, performing Upanayanadi and performing Shraddha Tarpan for the relatives of ancestors, as per the saying "Dharmo Rakshati Rakshataha".

contact.mapAlt: Map showing Sri Raghavendra Swamy Temple location

footer.address: 2nd main road, Gowdappa layout, Raghavendra Swamy Temple, Adakamaranahalli - 562123
